testcase.name: test_analyze_vault_action

failure.message:
AssertionError: Analyze vault failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_guardian_ai.py:140: in test_analyze_vault_action assert response.status_code == 200, f"Analyze vault failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Analyze vault failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
